headline: Array Technologies (ARRY) Is Up 14.0% After Record Order Book And New Tech Leadership Hire – Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In the first quarter of 2026, Array Technologies, Inc. reported sales of US$223.41 million and net income of US$2.00 million, while also highlighting a record US$2.40 billion order book, reaffirmed full-year 2026 guidance, growing international projects, and the launch of its DuraTrack D2S next-generation dual-row tracker. Array also hired former First Solar executive Charlie Wickersham as Senior Vice President of Technology to steer its hardware and SmartTrack software roadmap, underscoring...

headline: Solar Stocks Could Have More Room to Run. First Solar, SolarEdge Charts Turn Bullish.
summary: Ever since, solar stocks have shown renewed signs of life.  Improving technical momentum and growing long-term demand for clean energy—helped by higher crude oil prices—are attracting investors back into the formerly beaten-down sector.  Several solar stocks are attempting to break out of major bases, raising the possibility that a broader recovery may be getting under way.

headline: As Iran-U.S. Negotiations Break Down, The Risks Of An Economic Contraction Mount
summary: Geopolitical tensions and an escalating energy crisis threaten global economic stability, warranting defensive portfolio positioning.
